gpu: AMD Radeon RX 9070 XT (radeonsi, gfx1201, ACO, DRM 3.64, 7.0.10-1-cachyos)

notes: Cutscenes are all crashing

The Game always crashed on the first cutscene with my NVIDIA GPU, but after switching to the beta drivers fixed it, and now it works great!

```sudo pacman -U https://debug.cachyos.org/nvidia/610/{lib32-nvidia-utils,lib32-opencl-nvidia,libxnvctrl,nvidia-open-dkms,nvidia-settings,nvidia-utils,opencl-nvidia}-610.43.02-1-x86_64.pkg.tar.zst```

Reaching the Menu fine, but game freezes about 30 seconds into first cutscene. I tried these Launch options VKD3D_CONFIG=no_async_compute,no_upload_hvv VKD3D_DISABLE_EXTENSIONS=VK_EXT_mesh_shader,VK_NV_raw_access_chains %command% and setting every Graphics option to the Lowest option according to https://gamerblurb.com/articles/007-first-light-black-screen-fix-guide which got me through the cutscene. Then when turning the settings back up it instantly freezes back up again.

gpu: AMD Radeon RX 9070 XT (radeonsi, gfx1201, ACO, DRM 3.64, 6.18.16-2-cachyos-lts)
notes: Rodando liso, 20 hrs de jogo e sem erros ou fechamentos inesperados.

Proton default, experemental and Hotfix do not register keyboard. I was not able to pass through "Press [F] to start".

Proton 11.0 (Beta) allowed me to pass through initial screen to the game menu. But when I start the first mission then everything freeze.

Proton GE 10-34 (the latest for me) shows back screen from the start.

I assume it is a configuration issue. Because I run a 4 years old linux distribution with nvidia graphics and 580 proprietary driver. On the one hand this configuration is not ideal on the other hand I am able to play pretty much any other "platnum" or "gold" games. I will wait for new nvidia drivers I guess.
Overall ran pretty good.
Even with every setting at it's lowest and FSR performance, the FPS hovers around 15-25 fps. Not playable on the Steam deck.
Works after switching to Proton Experimental
